title: Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur
tagline: Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Baneshwar Temple The word "Baneshwar" is coined with a very literal sense where "Ban" means Forest and Ishwar stands for God.
overview.description: Baneshwar Temple The word "Baneshwar" is coined with a very literal sense where "Ban" means Forest and Ishwar stands for God. So when the God resides within a forest, the place can be rightly named as Baneshwar. This name is given to the Baneshwar temple which is located in the midst of a dense green patch.

topPlaces.name: Nasrapur
topPlaces.description: Nasrapur is a village located 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Bhor Taluka in the Pune District of Maharashtra, India. It is located 36 kilometres (22 mi) south of Pune, the district headquarters, and 160 kilometres (99 mi) from the state capital, Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Jambhali
topPlaces.description: Jambhali is a village in the Bhor taluka in the Pune District of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Balaji Temple, Ketkawla
topPlaces.description: Balaji Temple of Ketkawle, is copy of the original Tirumala Venkateswara Temple located 60 km from Pune, Maharashtra. It is on Pune-Bangalore highway.

topPlaces.name: Ambavane
topPlaces.description: Ambavane is a village in Mulshi taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. Talukas surrounding the village are Karjat taluka, Talegaon Dabhade Taluka, Mawal taluka and by Khalapur taluka.

topPlaces.name: Khed Shivapur
topPlaces.description: Khed Shivapur is a village in the Pune district of Maharashtra, India, along National Highway 48. It is located 23 kilometres (14 mi) south of Pune.

topPlaces.name: Bhatghar Dam
topPlaces.description: Bhatghar Dam is a gravity dam on the Velvandi (वेळवंडी) river near Bhor, in the Pune district of the state of Maharashtra in India. It is one of the oldest dams in Maharashtra constructed by the British during the time of the British Raj.

topPlaces.name: Bhor
topPlaces.description: Bhor () is a town and a municipal council in Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Nasrapur is a village located 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Bhor Taluka in the Pune District of Maharashtra, India. It is located 36 kilometres (22 mi) south of Pune, the district headquarters, and 160 kilometres (99 mi) from the state capital, Mumbai.

Balaji Temple of Ketkawle, is copy of the original Tirumala Venkateswara Temple located 60 km from Pune, Maharashtra. It is on Pune-Bangalore highway.

Ambavane is a village in Mulshi taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. Talukas surrounding the village are Karjat taluka, Talegaon Dabhade Taluka, Mawal taluka and by Khalapur taluka.
Khed Shivapur is a village in the Pune district of Maharashtra, India, along National Highway 48. It is located 23 kilometres (14 mi) south of Pune.

Bhatghar Dam is a gravity dam on the Velvandi (वेळवंडी) river near Bhor, in the Pune district of the state of Maharashtra in India. It is one of the oldest dams in Maharashtra constructed by the British during the time of the British Raj.
Bhor () is a town and a municipal council in Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (37 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (30 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur?
faq.a: Stays in Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Baneshwar temple, Nasrapur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nasrapur, Jambhali, Balaji Temple, Ketkawla, Ambavane, Khed Shivapur.
